parameters.jsCode:
const category = $json.category || 'escalate_support';
const from = $json.from || '';
const subject = $json.subject || '';
const body = $json.body || '';

const NEXUS_DOCS = `## WHAT NEXUS INTEGRATIONS DOES
Nexus Integrations connects business tools so data flows automatically. When a customer is added in your CRM, it appears in email marketing, accounting, and help desk — no manual entry.
Use cases: Sync contacts between CRM and email marketing. Auto-create invoices when payments are received. Push support tickets when integrations fail. Aggregate data for reporting.
Website: nexusintegrations.com | Docs: docs.nexusintegrations.com/quickstart
No setup fee. Upgrade mid-month with prorated billing. Annual billing saves ~17-19%.
Nonprofit discount: 25% off (requires 501c3 docs, annual billing). Education: 30% off (annual billing).

## PRICING PLANS

STARTER — $299/mo ($249/mo annual, save ~17%)
Ideal for: Small teams getting started
Integrations: Max 3 | API calls: 10,000/mo | Overage: $25/1K
Sync: Scheduled only | Connectors: Standard tier
Webhooks: Basic | Field mapping: Standard | SSO: No | IP whitelisting: No
Support: Email, 48h response
Onboarding: Community access
Trial: 14 days free | Cancel anytime | Payment: Credit card

PROFESSIONAL — $799/mo ($649/mo annual, save ~19%)
Ideal for: Growing businesses with multiple integrations
Integrations: Max 10 | API calls: 50,000/mo | Overage: $20/1K
Sync: Real-time webhooks (<5 min) | Connectors: Standard + Premium
Webhooks: Advanced with retry logic | Field mapping: Custom | SSO: No | IP whitelisting: No
Support: Email + Phone, 24h response
Onboarding: Dedicated 2h session + Quarterly business reviews
Trial: 14 days free | Cancel anytime | Payment: Credit card

ENTERPRISE — Custom pricing ($2,500+/mo)
Ideal for: Large orgs with complex needs
Integrations: Unlimited | API calls: Custom (250K+) | Overage: Custom
Sync: Real-time webhooks (<30 sec) | Connectors: All tiers including Enterprise-exclusive
Webhooks: Advanced with retry | Field mapping: Custom | SSO: Yes (SAML 2.0) | IP whitelisting: Yes
Audit logs: Comprehensive | Dedicated account manager: Yes | Custom connectors: 2/year
Support: 24/7 Premium, 4h response
Onboarding: White-glove onboarding + technical account management
Trial: Contact sales | Contract: 12 months typical | Payment: Credit card, ACH, Wire transfer
Data residency: EU (Frankfurt) or APAC (Singapore) available
HIPAA compliance + BAA available | Enterprise SLA configurable

ALL PLANS: 14-day free trial, cancel anytime (Starter/Pro), US-East (Virginia) + US-West (Oregon) default

## CONNECTORS

STANDARD (Starter+):
CRM: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho CRM
Email Marketing: Mailchimp, Constant Contact, SendGrid
Accounting: QuickBooks Online, Xero
Payments: Stripe, PayPal
Communication: Slack, Microsoft Teams
Productivity: Google Workspace, Microsoft 365

PREMIUM (Professional+):
CRM: Microsoft Dynamics 365, SAP Sales Cloud
Email Marketing: Marketo, Pardot, Adobe Campaign
Accounting/ERP: Oracle NetSuite, SAP S/4HANA
Help Desk: Zendesk, Freshdesk
HR: Workday, BambooHR, ADP

ENTERPRISE-ONLY:
Legacy: SOAP/XML Integrations
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server (direct connectors)
Custom: Custom-built connectors

Full connector list: docs.nexusintegrations.com/connectors

## SYNC & SETUP

How sync works:
1. Authenticate both systems (OAuth or API key)
2. Choose data to sync and frequency
3. Map fields between systems
4. Data flows automatically

Sync speeds by plan:
- Starter: Scheduled (15min to hourly minimum) — best for less urgent data
- Professional: Real-time via webhooks, <5 min — best for time-sensitive data
- Enterprise: Real-time via webhooks, <30 sec — near-instant

Authentication troubleshooting:
- Use admin credentials with API access enabled
- Salesforce: Setup > User Profiles > enable API access; create Connected App with OAuth 2.0
- OAuth errors: clear browser cookies and retry; check org security settings for 3rd-party access
- Still failing: contact support@nexusintegrations.com with error message

Custom fields missing: Settings > Integrations > [integration name] > Refresh Fields
Also check field-level security in source system.

API limits: Check current usage in Settings > API Usage. Overage billed at plan rate.
Custom fields: Settings > Integrations > [name] > Field Mapping > Add Custom Field

## SECURITY

Encryption:
- All data: TLS 1.3 in transit (all plans), AES-256 at rest (all plans)
- Automatic, no configuration needed

Certifications:
- SOC 2 Type II: Certified. Full report available under NDA — email security@nexusintegrations.com
- ISO 27001: Pursuing certification (expected Q3 2025); practices align with standard
- GDPR: Fully compliant. DPA available. Right to erasure honored within 30 days (privacy@nexusintegrations.com)
- HIPAA: Enterprise only. BAA available. Contact security@nexusintegrations.com
- PCI DSS: Not applicable — Nexus doesn't process/store card data; payments via Stripe (PCI Level 1)

Access controls:
- 2FA: Available all plans; org-wide enforcement = Enterprise
- SSO (SAML 2.0): Enterprise only — supports Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, others
- RBAC: Basic roles (Admin/Member/Viewer) all plans; custom roles = Enterprise
- IP whitelisting: Enterprise only

Data retention:
- Active integration data retained while active
- After deletion: 30 days then permanently deleted
- After account cancellation: accessible 30 days, then deleted
- Starter/Professional: 90-day log retention | Enterprise: Configurable

Data residency:
- Default: US-East (Virginia) + US-West (Oregon)
- EU (Frankfurt) + APAC (Singapore): Enterprise only

Data access: Only authorized Nexus engineers with business need. All access logged. Data never sold/shared.
Audit logs: Basic (login events, integration changes) all plans. Comprehensive (API calls, data access, admin actions) = Enterprise.

Pen testing: Annual third-party tests

## SUPPORT & CONTACTS

- General support: support@nexusintegrations.com (reply within 48h Starter, 24h Pro, 4h Enterprise)
- Sales (enterprise/partnerships): sales@nexusintegrations.com
- Security/compliance: security@nexusintegrations.com
- Billing/invoices: billing@nexusintegrations.com
- Legal/DPA/contracts: legal@nexusintegrations.com
- Privacy/data deletion: privacy@nexusintegrations.com
- Jobs/HR: people@nexusintegrations.com
- Docs: docs.nexusintegrations.com/quickstart
- API docs: docs.nexusintegrations.com/api
- Community: community.nexusintegrations.com
- Tutorials: nexusintegrations.com/tutorials`;

const ESCALATION_TEMPLATES = {
  escalate_sales: `Thank you for reaching out to Nexus Integrations. Your inquiry has been forwarded to our sales team at sales@nexusintegrations.com. They specialize in enterprise solutions, partnerships, and large-scale deployments and will follow up within one business day.`,
  escalate_support: `Thank you for contacting Nexus Integrations. Your request has been escalated to our technical support team at support@nexusintegrations.com. A specialist will respond within 24 hours.`,
  escalate_finance: `Thank you for reaching out about your billing. Your inquiry has been forwarded to our billing team at billing@nexusintegrations.com. They will respond within one business day.`,
  escalate_legal: `Thank you for your inquiry. Your request has been forwarded to our legal team at legal@nexusintegrations.com. They handle DPAs, security agreements, and legal contracts, and will respond within 2 business days.`,
  hr: `Thank you for your interest in joining Nexus Integrations! Your message has been forwarded to our People team at people@nexusintegrations.com. They will be in touch if there is a good match.`,
  spam: `Thank you for your message.`,
  misdirected: `It looks like this email may have been intended for a different organization. You have reached Nexus Integrations (nexusintegrations.com), a B2B data integration platform. If you meant to contact us, please let us know how we can help. Otherwise, you may want to resend your message to the intended recipient.`
};

const ANSWERABLE = ['setup', 'pricing', 'security'];

let userMessage;

if (ANSWERABLE.includes(category)) {
  userMessage = `You are a customer support agent for Nexus Integrations. Answer ONLY using the documentation provided below. Be specific, accurate, and helpful. Never mention competitors. Never invent information not in the docs. Keep replies professional and concise (2-4 paragraphs max).

NEXUS INTEGRATIONS DOCUMENTATION:
${NEXUS_DOCS}

---
Email to answer:
From: ${from}
Subject: ${subject}
Body: ${body}

Category: ${category}

Write a helpful reply grounded in the documentation above.`;
} else {
  // Use template for escalations, HR, spam, misdirected
  const template = ESCALATION_TEMPLATES[category] || ESCALATION_TEMPLATES.escalate_support;
  userMessage = `You are a customer support agent for Nexus Integrations. Use the template below as your reply, but adjust the opening line to acknowledge the customer's specific topic naturally. Keep it brief and professional.

TEMPLATE: ${template}

Email context:
From: ${from}
Subject: ${subject}
Body: ${body}

Write the reply using the template above.`;
}

return [{json: {...$json, userMessage}}];

body.subject: Help connecting Salesforce
body.body:
Hi there,

I just signed up for Nexus and I'm trying to connect our Salesforce account. When I click "Connect Salesforce" it redirects me to login, but then I get an error saying "Authentication Failed".

I'm using my admin credentials and I'm sure the password is correct. Is there something else I need to enable in Salesforce first?

Thanks,
Sarah Mitchell
Bright Horizon Consulting
